headline: FTX Pays $900M to Creditors in Fifth Round

article.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
article.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

article.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
article.summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

headline: Apple Surpasses Nvidia as $1 Trillion Leader

article.title: Apple Briefly Tops Nvidia as World’s Most Valuable Company
article.summary: Apple Inc. briefly overtook Nvidia Corp. as the world’s most valuable company, a title the chipmaker has held since May 2025.

headline: Baker Tilly Seeks $3 Billion Debt Refinancing

article.title: Baker Tilly Eyes $3 Billion in Debt to Replace Private Credit
article.summary: Deutsche Bank AG is preparing to sell about $3 billion in debt markets for accounting services firm Baker Tilly Advisory Group to refinance private credit loans, according to people familiar with the matter.

headline: BIP-110 Falters as Miner Support Stays Below 1%

Bitcoin Magazine

headline: ECB Flags $150B Stablecoin Threat to Bank Deposits
